title: Décor Chugger XXL 2.2L Sports Bottle – Leakproof, Dishwasher Safe, BPA Free, Half Gallon - Large Blue Drinking Bottle with Handle, Graduation Lines for Gym, Fitness, Hydration Tracking.
features: TRACK YOUR HYDRATION – Clear graduation lines make it easy to track your water intake throughout the day, making this the ideal gym water bottle keeping you hydrated during your gym sessions.
EASY-DRINK WIDE MOUTH – This extra large water bottle is designed with a wide opening for fast, effortless hydration and easy ice cube insertion, perfect for intense workouts & hot days.
REUSABLE & DURABLE - Crafted from crystal-clear, odour resistant Tritan, this tough 2.2L water bottle is made for everyday use, offering long-lasting performance.
DISHWASHER SAFE – Designed for convenience, this 2.2 litre water bottle is top-rack dishwasher safe, making cleanup quick and hassle-free after workouts, workdays, or adventures.
NO SPILLAGE - This leakproof water bottle features a secure seal to prevent leaks and spills, delivering a mess-free drinking experience that's perfect for daily hydration on the go.
